Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the ML Engineer, Agentic AI role at Zillow. Shipped two production SaaS platforms in 2025 that anchor on Claude as a primary reasoning loop; the work of agentic orchestration is my current craft.

Specifically, I built a cover-letter generation pipeline that routes across Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus based on cost and rigor per task. I mention it because it mirrors the tradeoffs agentic systems at Zillow scale will face: how to hold quality under throughput pressure without burning the budget on every call.

Happy to walk through the architecture on a call.

Christian Martin
